# MuleSoft Object Store Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.3) of Object Store Connector documentation.
> See [Object Store Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Object Store Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Object Store Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Object Store Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-connector-reference.md)
- [Troubleshooting Object Store Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Object Store Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-examples.md)
- [Define Object Stores Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-to-define-a-new-os.md)
- [Store and Retrieve Information in an Object Store Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-to-store-and-retrieve.md)
- [Set Up Watermarks with an Object Store Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-to-watermark.md)
- [Object Store Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store-connector/latest/object-store-xml-maven.md)
